summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Iteration 54 - Notification System, CDR Data Aggregators, and Document Generation. All 35 backend tests passed (100%). New features include: 1) Notification Center with demo notifications showing WebSocket, Push, Email channels with simulation capability, 2) Australian CDR Data Aggregators research page with 5 providers (Basiq, Frollo, Yodlee, Moneytree, Finicity) and implementation roadmap, 3) Document generation service for SOA PDFs and compliance checklists.

issues: Disclaimer modal appears on each page load - this is expected behavior for financial services compliance

critical_code_review_comments: Notification System provides demo mode showing what notifications would be sent via WebSocket, Push, Email, SMS channels
8 sample notification types: portfolio_drift, tax_opportunity, compliance_due, idle_cash, retirement_risk, meeting_reminder, market_event, client_login
Email preview generates professional HTML email templates with Wealth Command branding
CDR Data Aggregators page provides research on 5 Australian providers with CDR accreditation
Recommendation engine suggests providers based on use case (wealth_management, financial_planning, compliance_verification, client_portal)
Implementation roadmap provides 4-phase integration plan with budget estimates
Document generation service uses ReportLab for PDF creation (SOA templates, compliance checklists)
All new routers properly registered in server.py with /api prefix

success_rate.frontend: 100% (Notification Center and Data Aggregators pages working)

seed_data_creation: None - uses mock data in notifications.py and data_aggregators.py
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new Iteration 54 features working correctly. Key APIs tested: GET /api/notifications/demo (8 sample notifications), GET /api/notifications/summary (system status), POST /api/notifications/demo/simulate (notification simulation), GET /api/notifications/demo/email-preview/{id} (HTML email preview), GET /api/data-aggregators/options (5 CDR providers), POST /api/data-aggregators/recommend (use case recommendations), GET /api/data-aggregators/cdr-requirements (CDR compliance info), GET /api/data-aggregators/implementation-roadmap (integration phases), GET /api/documents/generate/soa/template (SOA template structure), POST /api/documents/generate/compliance-checklist (PDF generation). Disclaimer modal shows on each page load (expected behavior for financial services compliance).

mocked_apis.Notification_Channels: MOCKED - Email requires SENDGRID_API_KEY, SMS requires Twilio credentials. WebSocket is functional for real-time alerts.
mocked_apis.Data_Aggregators: MOCKED - Research/mock data for CDR providers. Bank connections would require actual provider integration.
mocked_apis.Document_Generation: REAL - Uses ReportLab for PDF generation (already installed)

api_test_results.GET /api/notifications/demo: PASS - Returns 8 sample notifications with channels info
api_test_results.GET /api/notifications/summary: PASS - Returns system status and statistics
api_test_results.POST /api/notifications/demo/simulate: PASS - Simulates notification delivery for all 8 types
api_test_results.GET /api/data-aggregators/options: PASS - Returns 5 CDR providers (Basiq, Frollo, Yodlee, Moneytree, Finicity)
api_test_results.GET /api/data-aggregators/cdr-requiremen: PASS - Returns CDR compliance info with 3 participation paths

frontend_test_results./notifications: PASS - Notification Center loads with 4 integration status cards, 4 tabs (Sample Notifications, Notification Types, Simulate, Email Preview), System Status section
frontend_test_results./data-aggregators: PASS - Data Aggregators page loads with 5 CDR Providers stat, 4 tabs (Providers, Recommendation, CDR Requirements, Implementation Roadmap), 5 provider cards
